name: Dev Reference, Card
description: Worked example of every plugin contract surface: cell_options of every type (string, textarea, number, select, multiselect, boolean, color, choices_from), a server-side fetch() that resolves shared state, and a client.js render that scales across xs/sm/md/lg. Reads the picked board from devref_core. Install both folders together as a bundle.

cell_options.name: board_id
cell_options.label: Board
cell_options.help: Pick a board from the devref_core admin page. choices_from delegates to devref_core's server.py choices() function so the dropdown stays in sync with whatever boards the user has saved.

cell_options.name: title_override
cell_options.label: Title override
cell_options.help: If set, overrides the board's name. Demonstrates the `string` option type and 'optional override' UX pattern.

cell_options.name: subtitle
cell_options.label: Subtitle
cell_options.help: Multi-line free text rendered under the title. Demonstrates the `textarea` option type (vs `string` which is one-line).

cell_options.name: stat_value
cell_options.label: Stat value
cell_options.help: A number rendered prominently as a 'stat'. Demonstrates the `number` option type + min/max constraints.

cell_options.name: variant
cell_options.label: Layout variant

choices.label: Stat hero, big number on top

cell_options.help: Demonstrates the static `select` option type (vs choices_from which is dynamic).

cell_options.name: show_sections
cell_options.label: Show sections
cell_options.help: Demonstrates the `multiselect` option type. The cell shows / hides each section based on which values are ticked.

cell_options.name: use_accent_bg
cell_options.label: Tinted background
cell_options.help: Demonstrates the `boolean` option type. When on, the card paints a subtle wash of the board's accent colour across the surface.

cell_options.name: accent_override
cell_options.label: Accent override
cell_options.help: Demonstrates the `color` option type. Empty falls back to the board's saved accent; setting a value here overrides per-cell.
